classes.reasoning: This is a catering invoice from Sabores Mediterráneos S.L. to Biorce Therapeutics S.L. for an investigator meeting. It is a commercial billing document for food, beverage, and AV services, not a regulated clinical trial document or TMF artifact.

summary: This is a commercial catering and event services invoice dated 14 September 2023 from a Barcelona-based catering company (Sabores Mediterráneos S.L.) to Biorce Therapeutics S.L. for services provided at an investigator meeting held 08–09 September 2023. While the event pertains to a clinical trial compound (BRC-471), the document itself is a vendor invoice, not a trial master file document.
